positive: A stylized, geometric woodland creature silhouette, specifically a wise owl sitting on a branch. The design should feature intricate, repeating mandala patterns incorporated into the feathers and the surrounding foliage. Use a color palette of deep sapphire blue, rich emerald green, and accents of metallic gold leaf texture. The composition must be perfectly centered and optimized for a single, bold print repeat. The style should blend Art Nouveau fluidity with modern clean vector graphics, featuring crisp outlines, high contrast, and excellent negative space. Studio-shot, flat lay style, high detail, perfect symmetry, print-ready.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, watermark, blurry, grain, artifacts, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, noisy, low resolution, pixelated, gradient fade, solid color background
